_note: This is an EXAMPLE Series Template Lock created from the Living Waters cover. Rename to [series-name].json and move out of underscore-prefix to activate.

template.imagery_style: Warm pastoral nature scene — sunlit valley, gentle river, golden sunrise, lush green landscape
template.imagery_swap_element: The specific landscape scene changes per book (river, mountain meadow, garden, lakeside, etc.) while maintaining the same warm pastoral feel

color_palette.prompt_injection: BRIGHT and WARM color palette: soft golden yellows, warm creams, light sage greens, morning amber tones. Light airy atmosphere, NOT dark or moody.

typography.title_style: Bold elegant serif, large, spanning upper portion
typography.subtitle_style: Smaller matching serif beneath title, 2-3 lines max
typography.author_style: Clean serif at bottom, readable but secondary size
typography.title_placement: Upper third to upper half of cover
typography.prompt_injection: Large bold serif title at top. Subtitle in smaller matching font beneath. Author name at bottom.

composition.layout: Title dominates upper portion, scenic imagery fills center-to-bottom, author name anchors bottom
composition.focal_direction: Landscape element (path, river, road) leading eye toward golden light source at horizon
composition.negative_space: Cream/golden sky behind title text provides contrast for readability

template.material_treatment: None — photographic/realistic imagery, no linen/foil/letterpress effects
template.lighting: Soft diffused morning light with gentle volumetric rays, warm golden tones from sunrise at horizon

source_cover.prompt: Professional book cover for 'Living Waters' by Daniel B. Lancaster. Subtitle 'A 30-Day Journey Through the Lord's Prayer'. Warm inviting pastoral scene: a gentle winding river flowing through a sunlit green meadow valley toward a soft golden sunrise on the horizon. BRIGHT and WARM color palette: soft golden yellows, warm creams, light sage greens, morning amber tones. Soft diffused morning light with gentle volumetric rays. Light airy atmosphere, NOT dark or moody. Christian devotional prayer book aesthetic matching bestselling Amazon prayer devotionals.

books.title: Living Waters
books.subtitle: A 30-Day Journey Through the Lord's Prayer
